title: Rockwell Automation to Report Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Results
text: MILWAUKEE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is scheduled to report its third quarter fiscal 2023 results on Tuesday, Aug. 1, before the market opens. The release will be posted on the Rockwell Investor Relations website at www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html. A conference call to discuss the quarterly results will be held at 7:30 a.m. CDT on Aug. 1. This call will be audio webcast and accessible on the Rockwell Automation Investor Relations website.
